element.name: Build Community Data Science Competency
element.description: Enable RegenTribe members to develop practical data science skills across SQL, ML, NLP, and Data Engineering for regenerative neighbourhood projects.

element.name: Structured Learning Pathway
element.description: Provide a clear progression from foundational skills (SQL, Statistics) to applied specialization (ML for IoT, NLP for governance).

element.name: Data Science Learning Capability
element.description: Ability to absorb, track, and assess data science cheat sheet completion + quiz performance + project output.

element.name: Learner
element.description: A RegenTribe community member engaging with data science learning materials.

element.name: Mentor
element.description: Community member with demonstrated expertise who guides learners in specific categories.

element.name: Curriculum Owner
element.description: Coordinator responsible for maintaining the cheat sheet catalog, auditing URLs, and reviewing community-wide progress.

element.name: Learning Tracker Service
element.description: Tracks cheat sheet completion, quiz scores, mentorship pairings, and project-based assessments per member per category.

element.name: Curriculum Delivery Service
element.description: Delivers structured learning materials: KDnuggets cheat sheet catalog, NVIDIA certification roadmap, assessment quizzes.

element.name: Cheat Sheet Review Process
element.documentation: Member reviews cheat sheets in a category, marks each as complete, builds familiarity with syntax and concepts.

element.name: Quiz Assessment Process
element.documentation: Member completes a timed quiz covering category concepts; scoring 70%+ marks category as assessed.

element.name: Mentorship Pairing Process
element.documentation: Member requests mentorship → system matches by expertise → mentor and mentee establish session cadence.

element.name: Project-Based Assessment Process
element.documentation: Member applies category skills to a real community project (e.g., IoT pipeline, community dashboard); project artifact serves as competency evidence.

element.name: Kreuzberg Knowledge Capture
element.description: Ingestion pipeline for community documents: PDF analysis, text extraction, concept/relation storage in SurrealDB knowledge graph.

element.name: Cheat Sheet Index
element.description: Curated catalog of KDnuggets cheat sheets with category labels, canonical URLs, last-verified dates, and RegenNeighbourhood mapping notes.

element.name: NVIDIA Certification Portal
element.description: Community-facing integration with NVIDIA DLI certification tracks aligned to cheat sheet categories.

element.name: Learning Tracker App
element.description: Gherkin-specified tracker: tracks member progress per category (cheat-sheet-complete, assessed, project-assessed), supports mentorship pairing, records quiz scores.

element.name: Community Knowledge Graph (SurrealDB)
element.description: Semantic graph storing learned concepts, member competency records, concept relations, NARS truth values.

element.name: Learning Dashboard Interface
element.description: Web or Telegram-based UI for curriculum owner to view community-wide progress: category completion rates, mentorship demand, peer-ready members.

element.name: Member Portal Interface
element.description: Member-facing UI for cheat sheet browsing, progress logging, quiz taking, mentorship request submission.

element.name: SurrealDB (Knowledge Graph)
element.description: In-memory分布式 database with embedded vector search, used for semantic graph of concepts and member competency records.

element.name: HP Edge Node (Raspberry Pi / Bare Metal)
element.description: Community-owned edge computing node running Nix-deployed workloads. Hosts local learning tracker instance and KB graph replica.

element.name: Web Scraper Pipeline
element.description: Automated pipeline to fetch cheat sheet URLs, verify they still resolve, and flag stale links for curriculum owner review.

element.name: Nix Toolchain
element.description: Reproducible deployment for all learning platform components (KB graph, tracker app, scraper) on edge nodes.

element.name: Telegram
element.description: Primary communication channel for mentorship notifications, progress alerts, and community announcements.
